Uses of Class
sacco.gui.Font

  • Packages that use Font 
    Package Description
    sacco  
    sacco.gui  

    • Uses of Font in sacco

      Methods in sacco that return Font 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Font Picture.getFont() 
      Font Canvas.getFont() 
      Methods in sacco with parameters of type Font 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Picture.setFont(Font f)
      sets the Canvas's font to the given Font object
      void Canvas.setFont(Font f)
      sets the Canvas's font to the given Font object

    • Uses of Font in sacco.gui

      Methods in sacco.gui that return Font 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Font SButton.getFont() 
      Font PaintBrush.getFont() 
      Methods in sacco.gui with parameters of type Font 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void SLabel.setFont(Font font)
      Sets the font of the SLabel according to the given Font object
      void SButton.setFont(Font font)
      Sets the font of the button according to the Font object passed as the parameter
      void SaccoButton.setFont(Font f) 
      void PaintBrush.setFont(Font f)
      sets the PaintBrush's font to the given Font object
